message:
fix(distributed): advance local sequence counter on snapshot apply

RegionBridge::apply_snapshot() previously only updated
sync_state.last_synced_sequence but left the local self.sequence
counter unchanged. If the applied snapshot had a higher sequence
than the local counter, subsequent locally created snapshots would
produce stale (lower) sequence numbers, breaking monotonicity.

Now sets self.sequence = max(self.sequence, snapshot.sequence) before
updating sync state, ensuring future snapshots always advance.

New test: apply_snapshot_advances_local_sequence_counter verifies that
a snapshot created after apply has sequence = applied_sequence + 1.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
